title: Gunfire at a Big Dinner Party
summary: President Donald Trump was at a big dinner party in a hotel. Suddenly, someone started shooting. Secret Service agents quickly took the President to a safe place. Many important people were at the dinner, like the Vice President and journalists. The police caught a man named Cole Tomas Allen. He was staying at the hotel and had guns and knives. One security agent got hurt and went to the hospital. The dinner was for reporters who cover the White House. Everyone was scared, but the President was safe. The police are still investigating why the man did this.

keywords.explanation: The leader of the United States
A person the police think did something wrong
A person who writes news stories

questions.question: What weapons did the suspect have?
What kind of dinner was it?

background_read: The White House Correspondents' Dinner is a yearly event where journalists and politicians meet. It is usually a fun night, but this year something dangerous happened.
Article_Structure: WHO: President Trump and other important people
WHAT: Gunfire broke out at a dinner
WHERE: At a hotel in Washington D.C.
WHY: The suspect is still being investigated

perspectives.description: The Secret Service kept the President safe.
People at the dinner were scared.
